text: Aster Athletics ships across Canada and the United States. Standard shipping is free on orders over 75 dollars and arrives in 2 to 5 business days. Express shipping is a flat 15 dollars and arrives in 1 to 2 business days. Orders placed before 1pm ET ship the same day.

You can return unworn items with tags within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Returns are free: print the prepaid label from your order page and drop the parcel at any carrier location. Refunds land on your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days of us receiving the item.

To exchange an item for a different size or color, start an exchange from your order page and we ship the new item as soon as the carrier scans your return. There is no extra charge for an exchange. If the item you want is out of stock we issue a refund instead.

Every Aster Athletics garment carries a one year warranty against manufacturing defects such as seam failure, broken zippers, or fabric pilling under normal use. Warranty claims are repaired or replaced at no cost. The warranty does not cover ordinary wear, accidental damage, or improper care.

Every product page has a full measurement chart. Most Aster pieces are designed close to your usual size for an athletic fit: the Flow Legging is a compressive high-rise and the Vent Tech Tee is a regular fit. Fit varies by style, so check the measurement chart and the customer reviews for each item before choosing, and order one size up if you prefer a relaxed fit.

Machine wash Aster technical fabrics cold on a gentle cycle with like colors, and hang dry. Do not use fabric softener, bleach, or high heat, which break down the moisture-wicking finish. The Cloud Hoodie can be tumble dried low. Following the care label keeps the warranty valid.

We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Aster gift cards. Payment is charged when your order ships. We do not store full card numbers; payments run through a PCI compliant processor.

Aster Circle is our free loyalty program. You earn one point per dollar spent, and 100 points is worth 5 dollars off a future order. Members get early access to new drops and free express shipping during member events. Join at checkout or from your account page.

Digital Aster gift cards are available from 25 to 250 dollars and are emailed to the recipient right away. Gift cards never expire and can be combined with any promotion. They are not refundable for cash except where required by law.

For orders shipping to the United States, duties and taxes are calculated at checkout so there is nothing to pay on delivery. Canadian orders include applicable sales tax at checkout. We currently ship only within Canada and the United States.

If an item you bought goes on sale within 14 days of your order, contact support with your order number and we refund the difference as a one time price adjustment. Price adjustments apply to the same item and size and cannot be combined with a return and repurchase.

Aster leggings and tops are made from recycled nylon and polyester, and our mailers are recycled and recyclable. Our two suppliers are audited yearly for fair labor and water use. We take back worn Aster garments for recycling through the Aster Circle program.

Once your order ships we email a tracking link, and you can also see live tracking on your order page. If tracking has not updated for more than three business days, contact support and we will open a trace with the carrier or reship the order.

Aster support is available by chat and email seven days a week from 8am to 8pm ET. Typical email response time is under a day. For an in-person fitting, book a visit at any Aster store in Toronto, Vancouver, or New York.

Vous pouvez retourner un article non porte avec ses etiquettes dans les 30 jours suivant la livraison pour un remboursement complet. Les retours sont gratuits grace a une etiquette prepayee. Le remboursement est effectue sur votre mode de paiement dans les 5 a 7 jours ouvrables.

La livraison standard est gratuite pour les commandes de plus de 75 dollars et arrive en 2 a 5 jours ouvrables au Canada et aux Etats-Unis. La livraison express coute 15 dollars et arrive en 1 a 2 jours ouvrables.
